title: Wonderful trip!!!
text:
Thank you to the entire team for our horseback riding and Okavango Delta excursion! Impeccable welcome and service, and above all, fabulous experiences.
We are truly delighted to have taken our excursions with Temogi Safari.
Thanks to Tim, Bruce, and JB

title: Okavango day trip
text: We had an excellent all day trip out into the Okavango delta including a mokoro canoe ride in waterways full of hippos with friendly guide Oscar followed by an informative walk in the bush. Lots of wildlife around and a tasty lunch at the end. organised by welcoming owner Tim. Highly recommend Tomogo who organised our trip at short notice.

placeInfo.name: Temogo Safari
placeInfo.address: Moremi road, Maun, Ngamiland East  S195550-8E233052.0 Botswana

title: There is no other place like Okavango delta
text: One of the best safari experiences I've ever had! Temogo delivered an unforgettable adventure in the heart of the Okavango Delta. Our clients were all extremely happy with every aspect of the trip—from the expertly guided game drives to the delicious food at the camp. As a tour guide, I’ve worked with many safari companies, and I can confidently say that Temogo stands out for its professionalism, and genuine passion for nature. Everything was handled smoothly. A big thank for your dedication and teamwork—it made my job easier and the entire experience truly special. I look forward to working together again in the future!

placeInfo.name: Temogo Safari
placeInfo.address: Moremi road, Maun, Ngamiland East  S195550-8E233052.0 Botswana

title: I wish I could Gatekeep this but that would be Unfair to the Team and their Brilliance
text:
I did the overnight Bush camp (two full days of safari) - I booked very last minute, having booked the Mokoro cruise, but when I saw the guys packing up for the camp tour at the office site, they offered me a place for an extremely well price, that I couldn’t resist.
So ten minutes before departure, wearing only the clothes on my back, carrying only sunscreen and insect repellent, I jumped at the chance!
Carrying so little was hardly noticeable since Timmy and his team accommodated me in every way, from organising dental hygiene products, to making sure I was well clothed to stay toasty and warm all night.

The camp was aided by a three-man crew: Tshapeng was our guide, and I’d like to think of him as a friend now. He was so kind, knowledgeable, I didn’t just learn about the animals, but also the plants, the people that have lived on this land since ancient times through to current plights.
I learnt so much about tracking animals, I really felt in the thick of the experience with him.
The chef accommodated all my strange requests, and he did so with passion. Food made in such an environment with so much enthusiasm tastes pure. He was so kind and knowledgeable.
Finally the preparation of the camp: I haven’t camped since 2011, I’ve always hated it and avoided it, but I think that’s because I was in festivals and not camping in the bush.
It was so much fun helping assemble the tents (voluntarily, I wanted to help but if it’s not your thing it’s okay too), the fire beneath the full moon that lit up the entire night sky. The canvas washroom was much better than even the gate toilets.
Finally, the night time Lion roars. It was everything I wanted it to be. Words cannot describe how incredible it is to be in this moment.
If there is one thing you do on the entire continent of Africa - it’s this.
If I wasn’t leaving Maun so soon I would 100 percent book again only with Timmy and his crew. In fact I wish I could stay a bit longer just to have this experience again.

I will be returning with my family/friends, I know these memories are going to be too strong and pull me back to Botswana.

title: The best of Botswana
text: With our family (6 persons) we made a 6 days safari with Temogo safari to the Okavanga delta, Moremi, Chobe and Kasane (River safari). During our preparation Tim was very helpfull and so was his team during the trip. Charles was a very experienced guide who gave us the best safari experience we ever had (including 4 of the big five and a lion hunt).  The facilities and food were very good.

placeInfo.name: Temogo Safari
placeInfo.address: Moremi road, Maun, Ngamiland East  S195550-8E233052.0 Botswana

title: THIS is the safari you thought only happend in dreams!!!
text: Amazing!!!...from meeting the owner, our wonderful guide, William, as well as Olie & Digs (apologize if misspelled). There isn't another company I would ever have chosen for this experience!!.. Absolutely everything was thought of for our 3 day/2 night safari. Our guide, William, has got to be the best guide in the entire area, he did everything to allow us the best experience, and he was above & beyond successful, we all truly, truly appreciated his efforts and his attentiveness to what we all hoped to get out of the experience, he literally made all of our personal hoped for sightings happen and then some! Food was plentiful and just amazing, I adored Olie & Digs and hope this reaches them, just to express how much I enjoyed meeting them, and appreciate how very well they took care of us and would choose them a hundred times over, thank you....thank you.....wanting to go on a safari???..THIS is the one, Temogo is absolutely the right choice, thank you so very much for having us;-)

placeInfo.name: Temogo Safari
placeInfo.address: Moremi road, Maun, Ngamiland East  S195550-8E233052.0 Botswana

title: Amazing Okavango Delta Experience - Sara & Jann
text:
We had 3 awesome days of activities, a combo organized by the (so kind) owner of Temogo, with a very reasonably price. We started with  I would say, the best safari ever with the greatest guide ever. The guide made sure we did not miss any animal, specially the Lions. We were very lucky to see so many lions and... 2 leopards... in the same day!!!! We had an overnight stay in the Moremi Game reserve and it was an amazing wild experience by the fire in the middle of the nature. As part of the Combo, we had a 3rd day of Mokoro full day which was also very relaxing, with a 1.5h walk in the bush. We could learn even more about the animals around and the flora. 
We are happy and for sure recommend the company to family and friends. Sara & Jann

placeInfo.name: Temogo Safari
placeInfo.address: Moremi road, Maun, Ngamiland East  S195550-8E233052.0 Botswana

title: One of the most affordable, highest quality mobile safaris in the Delta! Saved our trip!
text: We went with family to Moremi and Khwai on a mobile safari for 3 days/2 nights, and it was truly magical and an unforgettable memory! We had the most amazing wildlife sighting - multiple lion prides and many cubs. The guide was very knowledgeable and accommodating of our interests, and the camping staff were also kind, friendly and made our visit really special. Best of all, they are extremely affordable and flexible on arranging dates and trip itineraries, which was extremely helpful as we had a quickly changing schedule. They came through when we were short on options, and I am very grateful. I very highly recommend Temogo!

title: Great Experiences and Great Price
text: Spent about 4 days in the Maun area and were in a pinch to experience Moremi Game Park as our 4x4 would just not be capable enough to get to the park entrance and thru the park without some difficulties.  We contracted thru our hotel to book a full day game drive with Temogo Safari and Charles, our driver and guide for a price that was very impressive.  Tim, the operator/owner, was a pleasure to work with and the company was very timely and organized from pick up at our hotel in Maun to drop off at our hotel.  We had a very experienced guide in Charles who put us on to tons of animals and a lion experience with cubs that we will never forget.  Also to note, they had a great breakfast and lunch for us with everything that you could want.  When we go back, we will definitely be looking up Tim, Charles and Temogo Safari!  Thank you for Taylor and Katie from the USA

title: Excellent Service

Water and lunch were good. Thanks for a great experience!  We changed the boat trip to more bot and less hiking and they were totally flexible. Great service all around!

placeInfo.name: Temogo Safari
placeInfo.address: Moremi road, Maun, Ngamiland East  S195550-8E233052.0 Botswana

title: Excellent safari tours from this company
text:
We had a boat trip with Temogo and our guide was excellent and very knowledgeable, showing us many interesting things, we were told not to be disappointed if we didn't see many if any animals as obviously they can't guarantee there will be any, but we were in luck first of all we saw quite a few elephants by the river which was a glorious sight and then further down a crocodile we then saw cows and horses by the river, then we saw a Hippo and were able to get some very good pictures before it went into the water. We were also taken to a few other places and shown some bird life. I can thoroughly recommend the boat trip.
The next trip we had with them about 1 week later was a game drive to Moremi, now this was the big one, we were collected at 6am by our guide (Charles) who was really friendly and again we were told not to expect to see Lions and other animals as it depends on where they are at the time. As this was winter time in Botswana it was cold in the morning and our journey there would be very cold in a open vehicle but they provided blankets for us.
Before we even got to Moremi we were greeted by such lovely sights as Giraffes, Elephants and Springbok.
Once we got through the gates at Moremi we were treated to even more of the same animals as well as Zebras, Hippos, Crocodiles, Antelope, amazing bird life and even Botswanas famous sausage tree.
Throughout this our guide was excellent and would stop for the wildlife if we saw it before him although this wasn't very often as he spotted animals way before us and he stopped so as to let the animals cross in front of us such as Elephants and Giraffes which enabled us to get some great pictures.
At lunchtime we were able to get out of the game vehicle and have lunch by a lake that was surrounded by wildlife (on the other side) so were we eating whilst watching Hippos, springbok and Zebras by the water.
Before lunch we had seen 2 female lions and our guide got us very close to them, they had recently killed and had eaten so they were content with us being near them, so content that one of them got up and went to the lake for a drink, our guide followed her and again we got some amazing pics.
All of the guides there from other companies talk to each other and let them know what they've seen and after lunch our guide was talking to another one he found out that a male lion was nearby and resting after having eaten, it turned out it was in the same spot the female Lions were in, just as we saw the male lion the guide reversed and took us near the river, when we enquired why he'd done this he showed us this big Croc that was heading to the river so he parked in front of it and the Croc just lay flat and again we were able to take some amazing pics, after that we headed back to the male Lion to get some excellent pics and at one point the Lion looked at us but because he'd eaten he wasn't bothered by us. Our trip was drawing to an end but even as we were leaving we still saw plenty of Giraffes, Elephants and Springbok.
This is a long trip (ours was nearly 12 hours) and for most of that you are sitting in a game viewer and driving over very bumpy un made roads and you will be a bit sore at the end of the day but the sights you will see are totally worth it and with our guide the day was made totally enjoyable.

placeInfo.name: Temogo Safari

title: Wonderful Safari experience
text: We had a great time with Temogo on our 8days trip to Moremi, Khwai, Savute and Chobe. Everything was well planned and organized and we had nothing to complain about. If you plan to choose this company for your journey to Botswana definitely ask for Charles, our lovely and experienced driver and guide and Emos, our fantastic cook, to go with you on the game drives. Both of them fulfilled literally every single of our wishes and gave us the chance to enjoy the nature of Botswana in a extraordinary way.
